(I2K) Viral Hepititis CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: infections - viral hepatitis. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
333 I2L I2L_WOUND (I2L) Wound Infection CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: infections - wound infection. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
334 I2M I2M_NONE_ABOVE (I2M) None of Above Infections CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: infections - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
335 I3A I3A_OTHR_ICD9_CD (I3A) Other Diagnosis/ICD-9 Codes CHAR 7 Disease diagnosis: other current or more detailed
